title: Low-dose beta-blocker RCT in elderly hypertension
draft_feedback: Good idea but intro is bloated. The outcomes are fine. Power calc buried. Trim and justify dose; preregister.

title: Observational study of sleep patterns in residents
draft_feedback: Fine, but too descriptive; no analysis plan detail. IRB considerations minimal; expand.

title: Pediatric asthma inhaler adherence trial
draft_feedback: Risky because pediatric; consent/assent details thin. Adherence measurement unclear; need objective logs. Safety board plan missing.

title: Case-control of rare neuropathy
draft_feedback: Small N makes conclusions shaky. Case definition vague. Control selection biased; fix matching.

title: Microbiome and insulin resistance
draft_feedback: Interesting, but confounding not addressed. Data sharing statement absent.

title: High-dose steroid pulse in acute COPD
draft_feedback: High risk; SAE monitoring unclear. Rescue therapy not defined. Stop pretending blinding is possible.

title: Cohort study of long COVID cardiac outcomes
draft_feedback: Solid. But endpoints are a kitchen sink. Data management plan too hand-wavy; clarify governance.

title: Placebo-controlled migraine prophylaxis
draft_feedback: Placebo acceptable? Justify ethically. Run-in period questionable. Outcomes all self-reported; add objective measure.
